title: The Lady Boys of Bangkok - Glow Up Tour
full_description: With an explosive mix of dazzling performances, jaw-dropping costumes, and spectacular choreography, the Ladyboys of Bangkok is a must-see event for anyone looking to witness the ultimate in glitz, glamour, and sheer entertainment. A dynamic mix of music, comedy, dance, and theatrical flair — performed by Thailand's most glamorous artists. A night of pure escapism in an euphoric bubble of laughter, glamour, glitz and music.
ai_summary: The Ladyboys of Bangkok's Glow Up Tour brings their 30-year legacy of extravagant cabaret to Edinburgh Fringe — an all-new production showcasing Thailand's most glamorous performers in a high-energy spectacle of pop choreography, quick-change couture, and Vegas-scale cabaret.
